summary: Removed domain-owned English copy from PatternNudgeRules.DomainNudge. Domain nudges now carry only the semantic LifeDomain; TodayView formats the visible message with the existing LifeDomain.localizedDisplayName adapter and the new today.domainNudge.focusMissing localized format key. Added the key across all 19 supported Localizable.strings files with LLM-drafted values, and updated PatternNudgeRulesTests plus CalibrationRulesTests to assert semantic domain data instead of English message strings.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-helper-followup-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: PatternNudgeRules.DomainNudge carried a preformatted English message built in Core/Domain using focusBalanceTitle(for:). TodayView rendered domainNudge.message directly, bypassing Localizable.strings and keeping presentation copy in the domain layer.
contract_status_changes.after: PatternNudgeRules.DomainNudge carries only LifeDomain. TodayView owns presentation formatting through today.domainNudge.focusMissing and LifeDomain.localizedDisplayName. The format key is present in all 19 supported locale files; non-English values are LLM-drafted and not native-reviewed.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-helper-followup-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

residual_risks: New non-English today.domainNudge.focusMissing values are LLM-drafted and have not been native-reviewed.
No running-app smoke, screenshot proof, physical-device proof, or TestFlight proof was run for this copy surface.
recommended_next_reason: ReadinessRules is the adjacent helper-generated domain-copy follow-up with a larger visible Today nudge payload. It can mirror this structural pattern by returning semantic nudge data from Core/Domain and formatting visible copy in Features/Today.
